data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding graceful degradation when the agent is confused. However, there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this scenario has been tested or validated. The linked use cases and prior steps focus on booking processes and configurations, which do not address the specific scenario of agent confusion, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of testing the scenario behavior for graceful degradation when the agent is confused.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scenario behavior.
